title: Fiery Origin
description:
A enigmatic fiery being hailing from the Nether.

Made by: Pik4
body:
Made by: Amaranth_Red 
Description: A enigmatic fiery being hailing from the Nether.

🟢 Hell Being: You are immune to fire, you can swim and see in lava, you have many abilities and you can select them with secondary and use with primary at the cost of N.E (Nether Energy) which will be refilled while in the nether.

Inter-dimensional Travel: Teleport you to the nether or overworld. (Doesn't cost N.E, has a 5 minutes cooldown to teleport to the overworld again) 

‌Fire Burst: Shoots fire from hands that causes small explosion after some seconds, can also fuel furnaces.

‌Hell Hole: Sucks entities while burning and damaging them. 

‌Hell Step: Teleport to wherever you are looking leaving flames behind, ‌if you sneak while using it in the nether you will be teleported to the closest player.

‌Flame Boost: Propels you to the direction you are looking.

‌Overheat: Pushes entities back, burn and damage them, while using overheat most projectiles near you burn before hitting, and you become stronger, drains N.E over time.

Soul: If you sneak with this selected you will regenerate 1 heart in exchange for 1 soul, you can press primary key to toggle soul mode, while in this mode the other skills become stronger but cost souls instead of N.E.

You can prevent entities from being hurt by your skills by right clicking them while sneaking

🟡 Energy and Soul Bar: You can fill your N.E bar by being in the nether, using your powers will drain this energy, you can fill your soul bar by killing marked entities, you can mark an entity by attacking it.

🔴 Extreme Hydrophobia: As a monster made out of magma you take a lot of damage to water and get hurt by being near it.

🔴 Magma Body: Low tier armor and items lose durability over time while equipped, and you can't regenerate health naturally.

🔴 Nether Fuel:  You become 20% weaker and slower with 30% N.E or less.
